sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92267" key="r(e/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥέγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n92267.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥῆγος</ref> </xr> (q.v.), <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rug, coverlet</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:138" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">138</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
